metadata.name: circle_manager
metadata.description: Circle-based knowledge governance for Alcheme Protocol

instructions.name: bind_and_update_contributors
docs: 严格主路径：原子执行 proof 绑定与 contributors 更新

instructions.name: bind_contributor_proof
docs: 绑定贡献证明（创建 KnowledgeBinding PDA）

instructions.name: cpi_promote_knowledge
docs: 通过扩展程序提升知识评分（需要 CircleExtend 权限 + circle/knowledge 关系一致）

instructions.name: initialize_membership_attestor_registry
docs: 初始化成员准入签发者注册表

instructions.name: initialize_proof_attestor_registry
docs: 初始化贡献证明签发者注册表

instructions.name: update_circle_flags
docs: 更新圈层 flags 位字段（kind/mode/min_crystals 等）

instructions.name: update_contributors
docs: 兼容路径：在已绑定前提下更新 contributors

fields.name: flags
docs: 通用位标志字段，用于存储可扩展的圈层属性

types.name: CircleForkAnchor
docs: Fork 轻锚点 sidecar（避免把 live parent 依赖灌回 Circle 主账户）

fields.name: content_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the crystallized IPFS content, for integrity verification.
Computed client-side as sha256(ipfs_content) before submission.

fields.name: contributors_count
docs: Total number of contributors (informational, not enforced by Merkle)

types.name: KnowledgeBinding
docs: 知识贡献证明绑定（Knowledge 1:1 sidecar）

types.name: KnowledgeGovernance
docs: 知识治理配置（专注知识管理）

types.name: MembershipAttestorRegistry
docs: 成员准入签发者注册表（admin 管理）

types.name: ProofAttestorRegistry
docs: 贡献证明签发者注册表（admin 管理）
